hooks.command: echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"UserPromptSubmit\", \"additionalContext\": \"MANDATORY PRE-TASK: Before proceeding, invoke /suki-qa-gate (pre-flight check) and /claude-mem:mem-search with relevant keywords. Canonical refs: docs/canon/SUKI_ARCHITECTURE_CANON.md, docs/canon/ROUTER_CANON.md, docs/contracts/action_catalog.json, docs/contracts/skills_catalog.json, project/contracts/entities/, project/contracts/invoices/. Non-negotiable laws: never raw SQL, tenant isolation on every query, additive changes only, preserve JSON contract keys.\"}}"

echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"SessionStart\", \"additionalContext\": \"SUKI SESSION INIT — Documentos canónicos a revisar antes de cualquier tarea: (1) CLAUDE.md ya cargado, (2) docs/canon/SUKI_ARCHITECTURE_CANON.md, (3) docs/canon/ROUTER_CANON.md, (4) docs/technical/07_DATABASE_MODEL.md, (5) docs/contracts/action_catalog.json, (6) project/contracts/entities/*.json, (7) project/contracts/invoices/*.json. Usa /claude-mem:mem-search para contexto de sesiones previas.\"}}"
